main.description: Assert a corporate OWNERSHIP edge (子会社 → parent) into the kotoba Datom log (:company.ownership/*), sourced from GLEIF Level-2 Relationship Records (RR). Lets a brand-owning subsidiary roll up to its ultimate parent so supply concentration is computed at the true beneficial-owner level. Public-record data only (uchiwake G1). Non-adjudicating (G4): records the disclosed consolidation relationship, does not rule on control/beneficial-ownership in law.

child.description: → kabuto :company/id of the owned entity (the subsidiary)

parent.description: → kabuto :company/id of the owning entity (the parent)

sourcing.description: uchiwake G5; :authoritative when from a GLEIF RR record
